mission.title: backstage: 🐛 Bug Report: "Getting Started" failing
mission.description: 🐛 Bug Report: "Getting Started" failing. This issue affects 15+ users.

steps.title: Identify backstage troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your backstage installation:
```bash
npx backstage-cli info
```
Look for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review backstage configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant backstage configuration:
### 📜 Description

Simple app, following [Getting Started](https://backstage.io/docs/getting-started/) Guide fails.

### 👍 Expected behavior

Simple app should just run.

steps.title: Apply the fix for 🐛 Bug Report: "Getting Started" failing
steps.description:
## Hey, I just made a Pull Request!

The point of this is to resolve those annoying 'E2E Linux' checks that have been blocking everybody's PRs (9 of them from my team at the moment lol)!

I'm not confident about the decisions underlying #12252 or the answer to 's question
```yaml
[0] ERROR in ../../node_modules/swagger-ui-react/node_modules/react-redux/dist/react-redux.mjs 1097:18-45
[0] export 'useSyncExternalStore' (imported as 'React2') was not found in 'react' (possible exports: Children, Component, Fragment, Profiler, PureComponent, StrictMode, Suspense, __SECRET_INTERNALS_DO_NOT_USE_OR_YOU_WILL_BE_FIRED, cloneElement, createContext, createElement, createFactory, createRef, forwardRef, isValidElement, lazy, memo, useCallback, useContext, useDebugValue, useEffect, useImperativeHandle, useLayoutEffect, useMemo, useReducer, useRef, useState, version)
[0]
[0] webpack 
```

steps.title: Upgrade backstage to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade backstage:
```bash
# Check current version
npx backstage-cli info
# Follow the project's upgrade guide at https://github.com/backstage/backstage
```

steps.title: Confirm 🐛 Bug Report: "Getting Started" failing is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
Test backstage to confirm the issue is resolved.
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
## Hey, I just made a Pull Request!

The point of this is to resolve those annoying 'E2E Linux' checks that have been blocking everybody's PRs (9 of them from my team at the moment lol)!

I'm not confident about the decisions underlying #12252 or the answer to 's question [here](https://github.com/backstage/backstage/issues/22142#issuecomment-1888991931), but I wanted to see this PR run through
codeSnippets:
[0] ERROR in ../../node_modules/swagger-ui-react/node_modules/react-redux/dist/react-redux.mjs 1097:18-45
[0] export 'useSyncExternalStore' (imported as 'React2') was not found in 'react' (possible exports: Children, Component, Fragment, Profiler, PureComponent, StrictMode, Suspense, __SECRET_INTERNALS_DO_NOT_USE_OR_YOU_WILL_BE_FIRED, cloneElement, createContext, createElement, createFactory, createRef, forwardRef, isValidElement, lazy, memo, useCallback, useContext, useDebugValue, useEffect, useImperativeHandle, useLayoutEffect, useMemo, useReducer, useRef, useState, version)
[0]
[0] webpack compiled with 1 error

prerequisites.description: A working backstage installation or development environment.
